channel.title: Frontity builder for the Now hosting (Zeit)
channel.description:
We have created a **Frontity builder** for **Now** (thanks to [Luis Herranz](https://github.com/luisherranz)!):
* Repo: https://github.com/frontity/now-builder * Docs: https://docs.frontity.org/installation-and-deploy/deploy-on-now.
If you are using [Now](https://zeit.co/now) platform (which we strongly recommend), use this builder to deploy a Frontity project. This is the ideal way to ship a fast, production-ready Frontity application.
The Frontity - Now builder makes the **deployment process simpler** and means that the `npx frontity build` happens on the cloud (not on your computer). It also allows to get new deploys each time you push code to GitHub.

item.title: Frontity builder for the Now hosting (Zeit)
item.dc:creator: Reyes
item.source: Frontity builder for the Now hosting (Zeit)

item.title: Frontity builder for the Now hosting (Zeit)
item.dc:creator: Reyes
item.description:
We have created a Frontity builder for Now (thanks to Luis Herranz!):

  • Repo: https://github.com/frontity/now-builder
  • Docs: https://docs.frontity.org/installation-and-deploy/deploy-on-now.

If you are using Now platform (which we strongly recommend), use this builder to deploy a Frontity project. This is the ideal way to ship a fast, production-ready Frontity application.

The Frontity - Now builder makes the deployment process simpler and means that the npx frontity build happens on the cloud (not on your computer). It also allows to get new deploys each time you push code to GitHub.

Read full topic
item.source: Frontity builder for the Now hosting (Zeit)
